creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to vsityz from comment #4)
> (In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> > Yeah, I'd say that information on make.conf is pretty important, you might
> > want to include that all on PRs in the future.  That's a custom build.
> > 
> > Over to maintainer in any case..
> 
> With clang (default) not build also.

Except that portsmon says it does.
ImageMagick is a pretty important port.  You don't think it's strange that this is the only PR reporting that it doesn't build?
